Localization.Description: A connection is opened or closed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A connection between host {src.host} and host {dst.host} is opened
A connection between host {src.host} and host {dst.host} is closed
A connection between host {src.host} and host {dst.host} is opened. Assigned source IP address: {datafield2}. Assigned destination IP address: {datafield4}.
A connection between host {src.host} and host {dst.host} is closed. Assigned source IP address: {datafield2}. Assigned destination IP address: {datafield4}.
